text:
e Soul Power in every body is itself
called Jyothi. The elucidation of this Jyothi is known as Jyothisha.
In Jyotisha, the predictions (Phalabhaga) are written are
written as per individual knowledge. Injyotisha, there are 12
signs & 27 constellations. There are 12 ascendants from sun rise
to Sun rise on the next day.
'Ascendant' means the sign in which the exact degree
falls of birth from which the predictions are made.
Ascendant means, is it to be counted from the sign of
birth or is to be counted from the planets posited at the time of
birth in hours & minutes for the prediction to be taken as
ascendant is the question. These two methods need
research.
Some say Ascendant, 7 house/bhava etc. As an
example, for Aquarius (Kumbha) ascendant, the 7 house is
Leo (Simha). Leo isthe Sun's house. Ravi (Sun) is the Atma
Karaka planet. It has no other Significance/ karakatwa. Our
belief is or general presumtion is that 7 house means husband's
I wife's house.
